testcase.name: test_get_default_notification_preferences

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'muted_severities' in {'notify_on_breach': True, 'notify_on_escalation': True, 'notify_on_warning': True, 'per_severity': {'critical': {'email': True, 'in_app': True}, 'high': {'email': True, 'in_app': True}, 'low': {'email': False, 'in_app': True}, 'medium': {'email': False, 'in_app': True}}, ...}

testcase.name: test_get_user_specific_notification_preferences

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'muted_severities' in {'notify_on_breach': True, 'notify_on_escalation': True, 'notify_on_warning': True, 'per_severity': {'critical': {'email': True, 'in_app': True}, 'high': {'email': True, 'in_app': True}, 'low': {'email': False, 'in_app': True}, 'medium': {'email': False, 'in_app': True}}, ...}
